channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Tanzania Bureau of Standards celebrates 50 years with Viwango Marathon
item.description: The Tanzania Bureau of Standards (TBS) is celebrating its Golden Jubilee by organising the Viwango Marathon. The event aims to mark 50 years of the institution’s service in maintaining quality standar...

item.title: Meghan Markle Confirms She Will Not Return to Suits
item.description: Meghan Markle has officially addressed speculation about a possible return to the hit legal drama Suits, confirming that she will not reprise her role as Rachel Zane. Rumors had emerged following comm...

item.title: Office of the Solicitor General Supports Supreme Court Denial of Senator Bato dela Rosa's Request for Temporary Restraining Order on ICC Arrest Warrant
item.description: The Office of the Solicitor General (OSG) has expressed its support for the Supreme Court's decision to deny Senator Ronald 'Bato' dela Rosa's application for a temporary restraining order (TRO), stat...

item.title: Early Humans Survived Lesotho Highlands Through Cooperation and Fire
item.description: For Lesotho, early humans really no easy at all. Archaeologists don find say our ancestors survive for the Maloti-Drakensberg Mountains thousands of years ago, even during ice age, because dem sabi us...

item.title: FG approves five deep seaports to boost Nigeria’s cargo handling capacity
item.description: The Federal Government of Nigeria don finish all approvals, certifications and compliance matter for five deep seaports wey dey planned for investment. Dis na part of effort to make Nigeria fit handle...

item.title: Former Federal Prosecutor Indicted for Attempting to Steal Trump Investigation Report
item.description: The U.S. Department of Justice has charged Carmen Lineberger, 62, a former managing assistant U.S. attorney in the Southern District of Florida, for allegedly attempting to steal a sealed report on Pr...

item.title: India reviews preparedness as Ebola outbreak continues in DR Congo, no cases in India
item.description: India has not reported any case of Ebola virus disease so far. Nevertheless, the Union Health Ministry convened a high-level meeting on Wednesday to assess preparedness measures across all states and ...

item.title: Chinese Embassy Raises Concern Over Detention of 69 Workers in Misamis Oriental Steel Plant Raid
item.description: The Chinese Embassy in Manila has expressed serious concern following the arrest and detention of 69 Chinese nationals during a raid on a steel manufacturing plant in Tagaloan, Misamis Oriental. Embas...

item.title: Prince William Supports Aston Villa Ahead of Europa League Final Against Freiburg
item.description: Prince William has been actively supporting Aston Villa as they prepare to compete in the Europa League final against Freiburg in Istanbul. The match represents Villa's first chance at major silverwar...

item.title: Soaring Fuel Costs Put Pressure on South African Farmers Despite Falling Food Inflation
item.description: South Africa’s Agriculture Minister, John Steenhuisen, has highlighted a growing concern for the farming sector as record-high fuel prices threaten agricultural operations. While consumers are enjoyin...

item.title: Government invests in bridge to improve safety and transport along Mlima Nyoka bypass
item.description: The Tanzanian government has earmarked over Sh482 million for constructing a modern bridge in Uyole Valley, Mbeya, to improve safety and transport connectivity along the accident-prone Mlima Nyoka byp...

item.title: Petition filed to disqualify three BARMM MPs over alleged dual party membership
item.description: A formal petition was filed before the Commission on Elections Bangsamoro Registration and Accreditation Committee seeking the disqualification of three incumbent Members of Parliament of the Bangsamo...

item.title: Clarifying Labor’s Budget Changes: CGT, Negative Gearing and Testamentary Trusts
item.description: Last week’s Australian budget prompted an over-the-top reaction from conservative media and politicians, focusing on unfounded fears about housing market collapse and so-called 'death taxes'. Concerns...

item.title: HuffPost 2026 Shopping Award Winners Now on Memorial Day Sale
item.description: HuffPost has announced the winners of its 2026 Shopping Awards, highlighting 74 top-rated products across tech, home, beauty, pet care, and fashion. Many of these award-winning items are currently ava...

item.title: Saskatchewan Women’s Groups Applaud Supreme Court Ruling
item.description: Several women’s organisations in Regina, Saskatchewan, have praised a recent Supreme Court ruling considered a significant milestone for gender equality and women’s rights in Canada. The decision, whi...

item.title: Kenya High Court rules against criminalising consensual under-age sex, calls for better sex education
item.description: The Kenya High Court has ruled that minors should no longer face criminal prosecution for consensual sexual activity, emphasising the importance of access to proper sex education. Rights campaigners h...

item.title: Jerusalem and Kuse Set for Deciding Third Match in WBC Minimumweight Division
item.description: Filipino boxer Melvin Jerusalem is preparing for a third showdown against South African Siyakholwa Kuse after losing his WBC minimumweight title in their second fight on May 16. Jerusalem, whose recor...

item.title: Children’s Society garden at Chelsea Flower Show celebrates beauty in imperfection for young people’s mental health
item.description: The Children’s Society has won a gold medal at the RHS Chelsea Flower Show for a garden designed to highlight the beauty found in imperfection, particularly relevant for supporting teenagers’ mental w...

item.title: Bwala Explains Nigerians’ Right to Self-Defence Amid Rising Insecurity
item.description: Daniel Bwala, the Special Adviser to President Bola Tinubu on Policy Communication, don talk say the Nigerian Constitution dey give every citizen di right to defend demself. For one interview with Ari...

item.title: Kaduna APC Leaders Emerge Unopposed Through Consensus Ahead of 2027 Elections
item.description: For Kaduna State, di Speaker of di State House of Assembly, Dahiru Liman, plus di Deputy Speaker, Henry Danjuma, and di Majority Leader, Munira Tanimu, don secure APC tickets for their constituencies ...
